message.content:
Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_02-31-52_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.spec.ts
Activate test: "should still apply per-item first-insurance surcharge on a follow-up quote"
Current state: 21 tests passing
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_02-31-52_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.ts

Spec context: Per spec: "The first insurance surcharge still applies to the new sword, even though the customer is on a follow-up contract — each item in a quote is treated as a first insurance, regardless of customer history."

Test: Two-quote scenario where second quote has 2 swords.
- Step 0 (first quote, 1 sword newcomer): 100 + 10 + 5 = 115 G
- Step 1 (follow-up, 2 swords): 200 base + 20 first ins (per item) - 30 follow-up (15% of 200 base) + 5 fee = 195 G

Scenario:
{
  customer: {yearsWithMHPCO: 0},
  steps: [
    {op: "quote", items: [{type: "sword", material: "steel", enchantment: 1, cursed: false}]},
    {op: "quote", items: [{type: "sword", material: "steel", enchantment: 1, cursed: false}, {type: "sword", material: "steel", enchantment: 1, cursed: false}]}
  ]
}
Expected: results[1].premium === 195

Should already pass with existing implementation (per-item first ins applies regardless of follow-up).

Run tests with: cd /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_02-31-52_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7 && pnpm test

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Green after completion.
You MUST output the full Step 7 block verbatim (both Compilation
Prediction and Runtime Prediction lines, each with Correct or
Incorrect). Do not abbreviate. Do not collapse the two prediction
lines into one.

content.text:
The test already passes (22 tests passing). The implementation already correctly handles per-item first-insurance surcharge regardless of follow-up status, since `quoteItem` always applies `withFirstInsuranceSurcharge` unconditionally.

Let me verify the math:
- Step 1 (follow-up, 2 swords): 
  - quoteItem per sword = 100 + 10 = 110, × 2 = 220
  - sumOfBases = 200
  - Follow-up discount: 220 - (200 × 0.15) = 220 - 30 = 190
  - + 5 fee = 195 ✓
